name: meta-ads-baby
description: Meta (Facebook) Ads campaign management MCP server with two-phase safety confirmations.

interface.shortDescription: Manage Meta (Facebook) Ads campaigns through a safe local MCP server.
interface.longDescription: Meta (Facebook) Ads MCP server for listing accounts and campaigns, adjusting budgets, changing campaign status, and preparing new campaigns, ad sets, and ads with two-phase safety confirmation.
defaultPrompt: Show campaigns for a selected account.
